reference_directory_inventory.verification_note: Paths verified under observable-security-agent/reference/ at inventory time; gitignored clones may differ on other machines.

repos.primary_language_framework: Python (Poetry); UI uses Node in subpaths
repos.main_purpose: Multi-cloud compliance/security scanning with extensive framework packs (NIST, FedRAMP, CIS, etc.).
Cloud security posture / misconfiguration scanning (AWS, Azure, GCP, OCI, GitHub, etc.).

repos.alias_note: User expected 'cloudgraph/'; local clone is cloudgraph-cli from cloudgraphdev/cli.
repos.main_purpose: Multi-cloud GraphQL CSPM / resource graph with historical snapshots.

repos.primary_language_framework: Python monorepo (fixcore, fixworker, plugins) + Docker Compose
repos.main_purpose: Agentless inventory, graph normalization, and risk workflows across major clouds and K8s.
Multi-cloud security recon: exposure, secrets, privilege escalation paths.
NIST CSF 2.0 evidence aggregation and maturity scoring across many platforms.
MCP server to query FedRAMP 20x requirements by control, family, keyword.

repos.alias_note: User expected 'fedramp_20x_pilot/'; local clone directory is knox-fedramp-20x-pilot.
repos.detected_project_name: FedRAMP 20x Pilot Submission: Adobe Learning Manager (ALM)
repos.main_purpose: Public FedRAMP 20x pilot submission pack: narrative, machine-readable assessment, schemas, visualizations.
Open Cybersecurity Schema Framework definitions (event taxonomy).
Neo4j-backed AWS/cloud asset graph sync and intelligence.
AWS security posture / exposure style checks (ElectricEye).
